---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work as expected
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
---

**MCP client and version**
e.g. Claude Desktop 0.7.x / Claude Code 1.x / Cursor 0.4x

**Node.js version**
`node -v` output

**avito-mcp version**
`npx avito-mcp --version` or `npm view avito-mcp version`

**Tool name and arguments**
The exact tool you called and what you passed to it (REMOVE any sensitive ids/text).

**What happened**
Error message, stack trace, or unexpected output. Use the server's stderr log (Claude Desktop: `~/Library/Logs/Claude/mcp-server-avito.log` on macOS).

**Expected**
What you thought would happen.

**To reproduce**
Steps or a minimal MCP-client prompt that triggers the bug.
